sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113672" key="xeiropo/nia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειρο-πόνια</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱερά</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n113672.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">holiday of workmen and artisans,</tr_> Hsch (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-πονία</foreign> cod.).</sense> </entryFree>
